title: mentha aquatica var. lobeliana
intro: Mentha aquatica var. lobeliana, also known as Lobelia Water Mint, is a variant of the water mint plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lobelia Water Mint include reducing symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, alleviating headaches and migraines, and promoting relaxation due to its calming effects. Lobelia Water Mint can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
